item.title: HawkWing2002: Declan Rix @HawkWing2002 · 5min Preview of Thursday’s Craven Stakes at Newmarket, in a race plenty have the pedigrees an
item.description:
Declan Rix @HawkWing2002 · 5min Preview of Thursday’s Craven Stakes at Newmarket, in a race plenty have the pedigrees and physiques to train on well at three. Probably a tough betting race with that in mind, sure the market will guide, but here goes:
https:// attheraces.com/tips/atr-tipst ers/horse-by-horse-guide-betway-craven-stakes … 2 166

item.title: AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 13min "With a three-turning-four-year-old sprinter, you always hope there’s a bit of maturity
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 13min "With a three-turning-four-year-old sprinter, you always hope there’s a bit of maturity to come!"
Harry Eustace is looking forward to fielding Time For Sandals in tomorrow's Abernant Stakes... De attheraces.com 4 2 1 mil

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 16min Former stable lad disqualified from horseracing for 32 months for serious sexual miscond
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 16min Former stable lad disqualified from horseracing for 32 months for serious sexual misconduct and abusing his position De racingpost.com 4 1 2 mil

item.title: Drakesport: Alan Richardson reposteó Barry Drake @Drakesport · 51min The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 4
item.description: Alan Richardson reposteó Barry Drake @Drakesport · 51min The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 51 33 491 28 mil
